creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #17)
Hmm I do have binutils installed, but as a test I moved bfd.h out of the way and it still built - it does have its own copy it should use.

I don't understand why it wouldn't build for you. I wonder if this is like the situation with bug 273037.

I have fixed up the files mentioned - I still don't understand why 'make makeplist' didn't DTRT..
